Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to C.C.P. Section 583.410 and C.C.P. Section 583.420(a)(2)(A). Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
